user.title: Microsoft Family Safety
user.description:
**[Sign in with Microsoft →]({auth_url})**

Open the link above, sign in, then paste the full URL from your browser's address bar below. The URL will look like:
`https://login.live.com/oauth20_desktop.srf?code=M.C...`

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Microsoft Family Safety
reauth_confirm.description:
Your session has expired.

**[Sign in with Microsoft →]({auth_url})**

Paste the redirect URL from your browser below.

error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Please check the URL and try again.
error.token_expired: Your authentication has expired. Please reauthenticate.
error.no_redirect_url: Please enter a valid redirect URL.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

init.title: Microsoft Family Safety Options

data.auth_url: Auth addon URL (optional, for Docker standalone)

init.description: Configure the polling interval, monitored platforms, and feature toggles.

block_app.name: Block Application
block_app.description: Block an application for a child account.

account_id.name: Account ID
account_id.description: The user ID of the child account.

unblock_app.name: Unblock Application
unblock_app.description: Unblock an application for a child account.

account_id.name: Account ID
account_id.description: The user ID of the child account.

lock_platform.name: Lock Platform
lock_platform.description: Lock a platform (Windows/Xbox/Mobile) for a child account.

account_id.name: Account ID
account_id.description: The user ID of the child account.

platform.name: Platform
platform.description: The platform to lock (Windows, Xbox, or Mobile).

duration_hours.name: Duration (hours)
duration_hours.description: Duration of the lock in hours.

unlock_platform.name: Unlock Platform
unlock_platform.description: Unlock a platform (Windows/Xbox/Mobile) for a child account.

account_id.name: Account ID
account_id.description: The user ID of the child account.

platform.name: Platform
platform.description: The platform to unlock (Windows, Xbox, or Mobile).

approve_request.name: Approve Pending Request
approve_request.description: Approve a pending screen time extension request.

request_id.name: Request ID
request_id.description: The ID of the pending request to approve.

extension_minutes.name: Extension (minutes)
extension_minutes.description: Time extension to grant in minutes.

deny_request.name: Deny Pending Request
deny_request.description: Deny a pending screen time extension request.

request_id.name: Request ID
request_id.description: The ID of the pending request to deny.

set_screentime_limit.name: Set Screen Time Limit
set_screentime_limit.description: Set the daily screen time allowance for a specific day of the week.

account_id.name: Account ID
account_id.description: The user ID of the child account.

set_screentime_intervals.name: Set Screen Time Intervals
set_screentime_intervals.description: Set the allowed time window for screen time on a specific day.

account_id.name: Account ID
account_id.description: The user ID of the child account.

set_app_time_limit.name: Set App Time Limit
set_app_time_limit.description: Set a daily time limit for a specific application.

account_id.name: Account ID
account_id.description: The user ID of the child account.

app_name.name: Application Name
app_name.description: The display name of the application.

remove_app_time_limit.name: Remove App Time Limit
remove_app_time_limit.description: Remove the time limit for a specific application.

account_id.name: Account ID
account_id.description: The user ID of the child account.

app_name.name: Application Name
app_name.description: The display name of the application.

block_website.name: Block Website
block_website.description: Block a website for a child account.

account_id.name: Account ID
account_id.description: The user ID of the child account.

remove_website.name: Remove Website
remove_website.description: Remove a website from blocked/allowed list.

account_id.name: Account ID
account_id.description: The user ID of the child account.

toggle_web_filter.name: Toggle Web Filter
toggle_web_filter.description: Enable or disable web filtering for a child account.

account_id.name: Account ID
account_id.description: The user ID of the child account.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True to enable, false to disable.

set_age_rating.name: Set Age Rating
set_age_rating.description: Set the content age rating restriction.

account_id.name: Account ID
account_id.description: The user ID of the child account.

age.name: Age Rating
age.description: Age limit (3-20, or 21 for no restriction).

set_acquisition_policy.name: Set Ask-to-Buy Policy
set_acquisition_policy.description: Enable or disable purchase approval for a child account.

account_id.name: Account ID
account_id.description: The user ID of the child account.

require_approval.name: Require Approval
require_approval.description: True to require approval, false for unrestricted.

lock_account.name: Lock Account
lock_account.description: Lock a child account by setting all screen time to zero. Saves current policy for later restoration.

account_id.name: Account ID
account_id.description: The user ID of the child account to lock.

unlock_account.name: Unlock Account
unlock_account.description: Unlock a child account by restoring previously saved screen time policy.

account_id.name: Account ID
account_id.description: The user ID of the child account to unlock.
